The only modest scores reflect that News Corp is not a weapons manufacturer or tobacco company, and some of its properties (e.g. The Times) maintain editorial standards, but these are overwhelmed by systemic use of media power to obstruct climate action, democratic oversight, and worker protections.

woke.explanation: Wells Fargo remains one of the most ethically compromised major financial institutions. Politically, WFC spends heavily on lobbying (particularly around banking regulation), has a large PAC channeling donations to both parties, and benefits from regulatory forbearance: the recent news of eased capital rules disproportionately benefits large banks like WFC that regulators have shown reluctance to meaningfully constrain.
